/usr/bin/clang++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/calendar.dir/calendar_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/calendar.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/calendar.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/calendar.dir/src/database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/calendar.dir/src/eventdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/calendar.dir/src/categorydialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/calendar.dir/src/colorcelldelegate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/calendar.dir/src/categorybadgedelegate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/calendar.dir/src/tagchipdelegate.cpp.o -o calendar.app/Contents/MacOS/calendar -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtSql.framework/Versions/A/QtSql /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
